name: Zabhila
bio:
Physical Appearance: Khajiit female. Feline features characteristic of her race. Wears lower-class attire consisting of a coarse linen shirt and linens with oiled linen shoes - simple village clothing.
Race: Khajiit
Personality Keywords: quiet, faithful, fearful, superstitious
Role: Zabhila is a scout residing in Border Watch, a small Khajiit settlement on Cyrodiil's border. She shares a house with the town shaman, Ri'Bassa. Like all her fellow townsfolk, she believes in K'sharra's ancient prophecy that three signs will appear on the day the world ends.
Home Location Information: Border Watch village, where Zabhila shares a house with Ri'Bassa.
Daily Routine - Normal Times: Zabhila rises early at 4am and wanders around town all day long, talking with other residents. At 7pm, she eats dinner for two hours at the Border Watch Inn. At 10pm, she returns home to sleep.
Daily Routine - During Crisis: When the prophecy suddenly becomes reality, Zabhila runs around town in wild panic. Once the situation is resolved, she returns to her normal schedule while always keeping a wary eye on the sky.
Equipment: Zabhila relies on a one-handed short blade of the best possible quality, which may be enchanted. She carries only a few gold coins.
The K'sharra Prophecy: Zabhila believes in the prophecy of K'sharra that foretold three signs would hit Border Watch on the day the world ended. She also believes the gods are protecting the town. Once the related quest has started, she will point people toward Ri'Bassa.
Personality - The Wary Believer: Zabhila is not very talkative, like the other Khajiit in town. She lives in peace and harmony, believing the gods protect Border Watch. When the prophecy appears to come true, she runs around in wild panic. After the crisis passes, she returns to normal life but always keeps a wary eye on the sky.
author: Bethesda
